name: Logic Design Basic
summary: Runs the core Reflexion workflow for turning a natural-language genetic-circuit request into computational candidate designs with Verilog, mapping, simulation, benchmark review, and repair.

stages.name: Pre-design elicitation
stages.summary: Completes chassis, input, output, logic relation, and copy-number fields before the core workflow.

stages.name: Logic proposal
stages.summary: Generates Cello-oriented Boolean logic proposals and draft Verilog candidates.

stages.name: Verilog translation
stages.summary: Translates logic proposals into Cello-compatible combinational Verilog.

stages.name: Cello mapping
stages.summary: Runs configured Cello mapping or explicit mock fallback topology generation.

stages.name: Kinetic context
stages.summary: Adds host-aware kinetic parameter context for downstream ODE screening.

stages.name: ODE simulation
stages.summary: Screens candidate dynamics with the reduced resource-aware simulation path.

stages.name: Benchmark review
stages.summary: Applies weighted heuristic scoring for functional, burden, robustness, temporal, orthogonality, and Cello-assignment signals.

stages.name: Critic repair routing
stages.summary: Approves candidates or routes LOGIC_ERROR and PART_ERROR feedback into repair/exploitation branches.

stages.name: Result consolidation
stages.summary: Promotes the selected node-level result into the global design state.

stages.name: Skill memory extraction
stages.summary: Captures successful or failed workflow traces as reusable design memory.

sample_prompts: Activate GFP only when IPTG is present and aTc is absent.
Design an E. coli reporter circuit that turns on mCherry when arabinose or salicylate is present.
Create a low-burden GFP logic gate for A AND NOT B with medium copy number.
risk_notes: Outputs are computational candidates and are not experimentally validated genetic circuits.
Mock Cello output can support UI and workflow tests but must not be interpreted as successful biological part mapping.
ODE and benchmark scores are screening heuristics rather than calibrated wet-lab measurements.
success_criteria: Structured specification is complete enough for combinational logic design.
At least one Verilog candidate passes local Cello-compatibility checks.
A best topology is selected with benchmark and critic feedback recorded.
Run artifacts preserve failure and repair context for reproducibility.
